title: InstiManage - Institutional Space & Resource Management Platform
description: Full-stack platform for managing campus spaces, room and locker reservations, and user communication. Real-time chat via WebSocket, JWT authentication, admin dashboards for analytics and scheduling. Backend self-hosted on a Samsung Galaxy A23 running Termux with Spring Boot; database on a separate Realme device running MariaDB; both exposed globally via Cloudflare Tunnel.

title: News AI - Self-Hosted AI News Aggregator
description: Spring Boot application that aggregates news from 5+ APIs, summarizes articles using Gemini AI, and delivers curated daily email briefings. Production-deployed on an Android device via Termux, exposed globally with Cloudflare Tunnel and a custom HTTPS domain. No cloud VM, no static IP.

title: Expiry Tracker - Production Inventory App
description: Spring Boot service for tracking product expiry dates, deployed live for real-world use. Runs on the same Android-based home server stack with HTTPS via Cloudflare Tunnel.

title: Multiplayer Blackjack - Real-Time Web Game
description: Real-time multiplayer blackjack with WebSocket-based gameplay, turn management, and deck logic. Spring Boot backend, Angular frontend.

title: DevMatch - Developer Collaboration Platform
description: JHipster-generated full-stack platform for matching developers on projects. React frontend, Spring Boot backend, full auth and role management.

title: Full-Stack Retail Management System
description: Retail management system with Spring Boot and Angular. JWT authentication, role-based access, database-backed inventory.

title: UPC Collector - Android Barcode App
description: Android application built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose for scanning and cataloging UPC barcodes. Modern declarative UI, camera integration, persistent local storage.
